dates.summary: OpenAI shipped GPT-5.5 Instant as the new default ChatGPT model, pairing a public product launch with a system card and positioning it around lower hallucination rates, clearer answers, and stronger personalization. Amazon added OS Level Actions to Bedrock AgentCore Browser, extending agents from web-page interaction to direct on-screen OS control via the InvokeBrowser API. Google also upgraded Gemini for Home to Gemini 3.1, enabling more complex multi-step smart-home commands and signaling continued competition to own the consumer AI assistant layer.
